title: Gnosis Pay Now Supports Celo, Bringing Global Card Infrastructure to the Leading Stablecoin...
opportunity_title: Gnosis Pay Celo Card Infrastructure-Live Integration Path for Developers and Fintechs
summary_text: Gnosis Pay's card-issuing and payments infrastructure is now live on Celo, offering developers and fintechs a concrete path to build card-linked stablecoin products. This is an actionable integration surface, with direct contact options via gnosispay.com or Celo's ecosystem team. BD teams can explore leveraging this infrastructure for wallet, stablecoin, or fintech applications. Gnosis Pay has launched its card-issuing and payments infrastructure on Celo, explicitly inviting developers and fintechs to build card-linked stablecoin products.
opportunity_details: Gnosis Pay has extended its institutional-grade Visa card infrastructure to the Celo blockchain, enabling real-time card issuance and payments for Celo-based stablecoin products. The platform supports KYC/AML compliance, Apple Pay, Google Pay, SEPA, and personal IBANs, all backed by self-custodial Safe accounts. This infrastructure is now available for external developers and fintechs to build card-linked stablecoin solutions. The announcement provides a clear commercial and technical intake path via gnosispay.com and celo.org. BD teams should consider reaching out to discuss integration opportunities for...
suggested_outreach_angle: Contact Gnosis Pay's partnerships team via gnosispay.com or the Celo ecosystem team to discuss integrating your product with their Celo-based card infrastructure.

title: Axelar Hook and ISM
opportunity_title: Hyperlane Axelar Hook/ISM Public Bounty Intake
summary_text: Hyperlane has an open GitHub bounty for developing an Axelar-based Hook and ISM, inviting external developers to deliver a concrete interoperability integration. This is a live technical bounty with clear requirements and a public submission path. Engaging with this bounty provides direct access to both Hyperlane and Axelar teams for technical collaboration. Hyperlane is actively seeking external developers to build an Axelar-based Hook and ISM through a public GitHub bounty, creating a defined integration project and a direct engagement channel.
opportunity_details: Hyperlane has posted a public GitHub bounty for building a Hook and ISM that enables Hyperlane messages to be routed via Axelar's General Message Passing (GMP) protocol. The bounty outlines specific technical requirements, including using Axelar's Gateway and inheriting from AxelarExecutable.sol, with documentation and code references provided. Deliverables include a working demo on testnet or mainnet with transaction hashes. This bounty is open to external developers, offering a clear intake path through the GitHub issue. Participation enables direct technical engagement with both Hyperlane and Axelar teams,...
source: GitHub Issues: Hyperlane – New Chain Requests
suggested_outreach_angle: Engage Hyperlane via the linked GitHub issue to scope participation in the Axelar Hook/ISM bounty and connect with Axelar developer relations to position as an implementation partner.

title: KUSAMA ZK RFPs scope on schemes to be used
opportunity_title: Kusama ZK RFP Program Open for Proposals
summary_text: Kusama is currently accepting proposals for its ZK RFP program, including submissions featuring alternative zero-knowledge schemes beyond those explicitly listed. This is an active grants/RFP intake for teams with ZK proving systems or related infrastructure. Interested teams can clarify scheme eligibility via the linked forum thread. The opportunity is live for proposal submissions now.
opportunity_details: Kusama has an active ZK-focused RFP program accepting proposals for zero-knowledge proving systems and related infrastructure. The forum discussion confirms that teams may propose alternative ZK schemes, not just those specifically mentioned in the RFP documentation. This broadens the scope for applicants with novel or specialized ZK technologies. The official RFP page provides details on requirements and submission guidelines. There is no named contact, but the forum thread can be used to clarify technical eligibility questions. This is a live grants/RFP intake, and teams should prepare and submit proposals...
suggested_outreach_angle: Review the Kusama ZK RFPs at https://zk.kusama.vision/rfps, assess fit for your ZK technology, and submit a proposal; use the forum thread to clarify scheme eligibility if needed.
